name: WFE Technology Corp.
summary: WFE Technology Corp. manufactures and sells electrical products primarily in Taiwan. It offers power integration products; and circuit protection products, CO and outside plant products, connectors, diodes, encoders, LED shunt protectors, magnetic products, microelectronic modules, position sensors, potentiometers, resistive products, switches, transistors and thyristors, trimpot trimming potentiometers, pro audio products, and automotive products. The company also provides quartz oscillators and microchips. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.
